Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Shapiro for John Weybrew.

Mr. Shapiro stated that he will be filing a Status Report later today or tomorrow, that he is waiting for the petitioner's signature. He further reported that the issues with the Hawaii property are not resolved and that they are not ready to file a petition for final distribution. The matter was continued to September 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the status report.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Continued To Feb-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney William Shapiro and the Administrator John Weybrew to appear on February 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a Petition for Final Disrtibution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report has not been filed. The status hearings were also continued to that date.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Inventory
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to William Shapiro (Attorney) for failure to appear and for failure to file the final inventory and appraisal. The return date is September 8, 2008.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Inventory
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Continued To Aug-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Shapiro for John Weybrew (Petitioner).

Mr. Shapiro reported that the first account and request for premliminary distribution and reimbursement was filed this morning for hearing set on May 7, 2008. Due to the property location in Hawaii, Mr. Shapiro was not able to close out the estate and had obatained new cousel to have the Hawaiian's Court to regconized the letters, and requested a continuance for closing of the estate.
Matter is continued to Aug. 11, 2008 for final Inventory and Appraisal.

Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: R. Hill; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/C. Herbert.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Shapiro for the Executor.

The Court stated that the Inventory and Appraisal was filed on February 22nd. Mr. Shapiro stated that he was not sure if it was the final as there are properties in Hawaii, and that he may have to open an ancillary in Hawaii. The matter was continued to March 24, 2008 for filing of the final inventory.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Maria Letora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.
